tagline_jsonb.en: AI-native backend automation for coding agents that ship full-stack apps without manual setup
tagline_jsonb.zh: 让 AI 编码智能体无需手动配置即可交付全栈应用的原生后端自动化平台

description_jsonb.en: > **Executive Summary:** InsForge is an AI-native backend platform for developers, vibe coders, and agent builders who want to automate auth, database, storage, and deployment work. Its core value is turning Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible agents into backend operators instead of just code generators. ## What InsForge does AI code tools can already scaffold UI and business logic, but backend setup still slows teams down. InsForge closes that gap by exposing auth, Postgres, storage, serverless functions, and AI model access through MCP so an agent can provision infrastructure from natural language prompts. ## Why it matters for automation The strongest angle here is workflow automation, not just code generation. In practical terms, InsForge lets a coding agent create tables, wire Google and GitHub login, configure file storage, attach AI models, and deploy a working app without clicking through admin dashboards. ## Technical depth InsForge is open source under Apache 2.0 and positions itself as an agent-native alternative to Supabase. Official pricing shows a Free plan with 50,000 monthly active users, 500 MB database, 5 GB bandwidth, and 1 GB file storage, while Pro starts at $25 per month with 100,000 MAUs, 8 GB database, 250 GB bandwidth, 100 GB storage, and $10 in AI model credits. ## Pricing and value InsForge offers a **Freemium** plan, with paid tiers starting at **$25/month**. It is **less expensive** than average for this category if you value bundled backend automation and MCP-native agent control over buying separate auth, database, storage, and model-routing layers. The main tradeoff is that free projects pause after 1 week of inactivity, which is fine for experiments but annoying for slow-moving side projects. ## Best fit InsForge fits teams building internal tools, SaaS MVPs, AI products, and agentic prototypes that need backend automation more than pixel-perfect enterprise polish. If your stack already includes Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or Codex-style workflows, it can remove one of the last manual bottlenecks in prompt-driven software delivery.
description_jsonb.zh: > **核心摘要：** InsForge 是面向开发者、Vibe Coding 用户和 AI 智能体构建者的原生后端平台，核心价值是把 Claude Code、Cursor 等 MCP 兼容智能体从代码生成器升级为后端执行者，自动完成鉴权、数据库、存储与部署配置。 ## InsForge 到底做什么 AI 编程工具 已经能快速生成前端和业务逻辑，但后端配置依然是很多团队最慢的一步。InsForge 通过 MCP 把鉴权、Postgres、对象存储、无服务器函数和 AI 模型访问能力暴露给智能体，让它可以直接用自然语言 Prompt 完成基础设施配置。 ## 为什么它对自动化有价值 它真正有竞争力的不是写代码，而是自动化执行工作流。实际落地时，InsForge 可以让编码智能体自动建表、接入 Google 和 GitHub 登录、配置文件存储、连接 AI 模型，并把应用部署上线，而不是让开发者反复点后台控制台。 ## 技术含量与产品深度 InsForge 基于 Apache 2.0 开源，并明确把自己定位为 Supabase 的智能体原生替代方案。官方定价页面显示，免费版提供 50,000 MAU、500 MB 数据库、5 GB 带宽和 1 GB 文件存储；Pro 版起价 $25/月，包含 100,000 MAU、8 GB 数据库、250 GB 带宽、100 GB 存储，以及每月 $10 AI 模型积分。 ## 价格与投入产出比 InsForge offers a **Freemium** plan, with paid tiers starting at **$25/month**. It is **less expensive** than average for this category. 如果你本来就要分别采购鉴权、数据库、存储和模型网关，InsForge 的一体化方案通常更省事也更省钱。它最大的限制是免费项目在 1 周无活动后会自动暂停，适合试验，不太适合长期低频项目。 ## 适合谁用 InsForge 最适合做内部工具、SaaS MVP、AI 产品原型和各种智能体应用，因为这类项目最需要的是后端自动化，而不是超成熟的企业后台生态。对于已经把 Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf 或 Codex 类工作流作为主力开发方式的团队，它能明显减少最后那部分必须手动完成的配置工作。

Scale from 50,000 to 100,000 MAUs between Free and Pro plans

en.summary: InsForge is the **smart** choice for **AI-first developers and vibe coders** who need to **automate full-stack backend setup with MCP-native agents**. It stands out because it removes dashboard-heavy backend work instead of just helping you write code. If your team already builds with Claude Code or Cursor, InsForge makes the path from prompt to deployed app materially faster.
en.expert_quote: LinkStart AI Lab says InsForge is one of the clearest examples of agent infrastructure becoming a real product category. It does not just attach AI to backend tooling; it restructures backend operations so MCP agents can execute them end to end.
pros: Automates auth, DB, storage, and deployment in one MCP workflow
Fits Claude Code and Cursor backend automation use cases well
Free tier includes 50,000 MAUs for serious prototyping
Open-source stack supports Docker self-hosting experiments
Unified AI credits simplify multi-model app building
Good for SaaS MVP backend setup with minimal dashboard work
cons: Free projects pause after 1 week of inactivity
Ecosystem is smaller than Supabase and Firebase
Best experience assumes MCP-native coding workflows
Enterprise polish still trails older backend platforms

zh.summary: InsForge 是 **AI 优先开发者和 Vibe Coding 用户** 的**强力选择**，尤其适合 **用 MCP 原生智能体自动完成全栈后端配置** 的团队。它真正拉开差距的地方，不是帮你多写一点代码，而是把原本要手工点后台的工作直接交给智能体执行。对于已经把 Claude Code 或 Cursor 作为主力工作流的团队，它能明显加快从 Prompt 到线上应用的交付速度。
zh.expert_quote: LinkStart AI Lab 认为，InsForge 是 Agent Infrastructure 从概念走向产品化的典型代表。它不是简单把 AI 接到后端工具上，而是把后端操作流程重构成可由 MCP 智能体端到端执行的系统。
pros: 把鉴权、数据库、存储、部署合并进一个 MCP 工作流
非常适合 Claude Code 和 Cursor 后端自动化场景
免费版含 50,000 MAU，原型阶段够用
开源加 Docker 适合自托管试验
统一 AI 积分便于多模型应用开发
适合 SaaS MVP 后端快速落地
cons: 免费项目 1 周无活动就会暂停
生态规模仍小于 Supabase 和 Firebase
最佳体验依赖 MCP 原生开发方式
企业级成熟度暂时不如老牌平台

question.en: InsForge vs Supabase: which is better for Claude Code and Cursor backend automation?
question.zh: InsForge 和 Supabase，哪个更适合 Claude Code 与 Cursor 的后端自动化？

answer.en: The core difference is agent control. While Supabase is stronger for mature developer-led Postgres workflows, InsForge is better for MCP-native automation because it is built to let Claude Code and Cursor provision auth, storage, database, and deployment from prompts. If your goal is backend setup with minimal dashboard work, InsForge is the better fit.
answer.zh: 核心区别在于智能体控制能力。虽然 Supabase 更适合成熟的开发者主导 Postgres 工作流，但 InsForge 更适合 MCP 原生自动化，因为它就是为让 Claude Code 和 Cursor 通过 Prompt 完成鉴权、存储、数据库和部署而设计的。如果你追求尽量少点后台，InsForge 更合适。

question.en: What are the biggest real-world complaints about InsForge right now?
question.zh: InsForge 目前在真实用户讨论里最大的槽点是什么？

answer.en: The biggest complaints are ecosystem depth and free-tier inactivity pauses. Reddit and creator reviews repeatedly point out that free projects stop after 1 week of inactivity, and compared with Supabase or Firebase, the integration ecosystem is still thinner. The workaround is to use it for fast MVP delivery first, then evaluate self-hosting or Pro.
answer.zh: 最大的问题主要是生态深度和免费版暂停机制。Reddit 讨论和创作者测评都反复提到，免费项目 1 周无活动就会暂停，而且和 Supabase、Firebase 相比，集成生态还不够厚。更现实的做法是先拿它快速交付 MVP，再评估自托管或升级 Pro。

question.en: Does InsForge have a free tier, and what are the real limits?
question.zh: InsForge 有免费版吗，真实限制有哪些？

answer.en: Yes. Prices start at $0 for Free and $25 per month for Pro. Free includes $1 AI credits, 50,000 MAUs, 500 MB database, 5 GB bandwidth, and 1 GB storage, but free projects pause after 1 week of inactivity, so it is better for active prototyping than passive hosting.
answer.zh: 有。InsForge 免费版是 $0，Pro 版是 $25/月。免费版包含 $1 AI 积分、50,000 MAU、500 MB 数据库、5 GB 带宽和 1 GB 存储，但项目 1 周无活动后会暂停，所以更适合持续开发中的原型，不适合长期低频托管。

question.en: How does InsForge fit into a modern AI development workflow with Claude Code, Cursor, or Zeabur?
question.zh: InsForge 如何接入 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Zeabur 这样的现代 AI 开发工作流？

answer.en: It fits as the backend execution layer. You connect Claude Code or Cursor through MCP, let InsForge handle auth, Postgres, storage, and functions, and can pair it with Zeabur for code-to-cloud deployment. That makes it useful in agentic pipelines where frontend generation, backend provisioning, and hosting happen in one loop.
answer.zh: 它适合充当后端执行层。你把 Claude Code 或 Cursor 通过 MCP 接进来，让 InsForge 处理鉴权、Postgres、存储和函数，再结合 Zeabur 做云端部署。这样前端生成、后端配置和上线发布就能进入同一个智能体闭环。

question.en: Is InsForge safe for private code and production workloads?
question.zh: InsForge 对私有代码和生产环境安全吗？

answer.en: Yes for many production cases, but the answer depends on deployment mode. The official Enterprise plan adds SOC2, SSO, dedicated support, and optional HIPAA, while the open-source Apache 2.0 version gives teams a self-hosting path with Docker. For sensitive workloads, self-hosting or Enterprise is the safer route than staying on Free.
answer.zh: 多数生产场景可以用，但关键取决于部署方式。官方 Enterprise 提供 SOC2、SSO、专属支持和可选 HIPAA，而 Apache 2.0 开源版本则给团队提供了基于 Docker 的自托管路径。对敏感业务来说，自托管或 Enterprise 明显比免费版更稳妥。

question.en: Can InsForge actually build a SaaS MVP like a newsletter app, uptime monitor, or Linktree-style product?
question.zh: InsForge 真的能做出新闻订阅应用、状态监控工具或 Linktree 类 SaaS MVP 吗？

answer.en: Yes. Recent YouTube demos show InsForge used for a newsletter app, an uptime-monitoring SaaS, and a link-in-bio style product with auth, storage, and deployment. It is best for AI-assisted MVPs where speed matters more than deep enterprise workflow customization.
answer.zh: 可以。近期 YouTube 演示已经展示了用 InsForge 做新闻订阅应用、状态监控 SaaS 和 Linktree 风格产品，并且都包含鉴权、存储和部署能力。它尤其适合追求交付速度高于复杂企业定制的 AI 辅助 MVP 场景。

en.reason: This comparison focuses on **real replacement choices** developers make when moving from manual backend setup to **AI-native backend automation**. **InsForge** competes most directly with **Supabase** for Postgres-based app backends and **Firebase** for fast full-stack shipping, but it differentiates through MCP-native agent execution.
en.caption: Comparison: InsForge vs Core Backend Alternatives
rows: Core use case
**Agent-native backend automation** for Claude Code, Cursor, and MCP workflows
**Developer-led Postgres backend** for apps needing mature SQL tooling
**Rapid app backend** for mobile and web teams using Google infrastructure
Differentiated killer feature
**MCP-first execution** so agents can configure auth, DB, storage, and deployment
**Mature Postgres ecosystem** with broad docs, templates, and community depth
**Realtime and Google stack integration** for fast consumer app shipping
Performance and limits
**50,000 MAUs free** and **100,000 MAUs Pro**, but free projects pause after 1 week
**Strong stability and ecosystem**, but more setup still happens in dashboards
**High scalability**, but NoSQL and pricing complexity can raise architectural cost
Integration and learning curve
**Best with Claude Code, Cursor, Zeabur, and MCP agents**; easiest for AI-first builders
**Best for SQL-savvy teams** already comfortable with Postgres and backend ops
**Best for Google-centric teams**; simpler early on, but backend logic can get fragmented
ROI for MVP teams
**High ROI** when one agent handles backend automation end to end
**High ROI** for teams that want long-term control and mature backend patterns
**High ROI** for mobile startups, but less ideal for MCP-driven agent workflows
Best buyer profile
**AI app builders** shipping agentic SaaS, internal tools, and vibe-coded products
**Full-stack developers** wanting a proven SQL backend platform
**Startup and mobile teams** prioritizing speed inside the Google ecosystem
en.tldr: **Buy InsForge** if your priority is turning Claude Code or Cursor into a backend operator, not just a code generator. **Buy Supabase** if you want the safest mature SQL ecosystem. **Buy Firebase** if you need Google-native speed, realtime sync, and mobile-first scale.

zh.reason: 这个对比不是泛泛而谈，而是围绕开发者最真实的**替换决策**来做的。对于想从手动后端配置切换到 **AI 原生后端自动化** 的团队来说，**InsForge** 最直接的平替对象就是 **Supabase** 和 **Firebase**，但它最大的差异点在于 MCP 原生智能体执行能力。
zh.caption: 目标产品与核心竞品参数对比
rows: 核心痛点场景
**面向智能体的后端自动化**，适合 Claude Code、Cursor 和 MCP 工作流
**开发者主导的 Postgres 后端**，适合需要成熟 SQL 能力的应用
**快速交付型应用后端**，适合依赖 Google 基础设施的团队
差异化杀手锏
**MCP 优先执行模型**，让智能体直接配置鉴权、数据库、存储和部署
**成熟的 Postgres 生态**，文档、模板和社区资源都更丰富
**实时能力加 Google 生态整合**，适合快速上线消费级产品
性能表现与限制
**免费 50,000 MAU**，**Pro 100,000 MAU**，但免费项目 1 周无活动会暂停
**稳定性和生态成熟度高**，但不少配置仍然要靠后台手动完成
**扩展性强**，但 NoSQL 架构和计费复杂度可能抬高长期成本
生态与上手门槛
**最适合 Claude Code、Cursor、Zeabur 和 MCP 智能体**，对 AI 优先团队最友好
**最适合熟悉 SQL 的团队**，尤其是本来就能驾驭 Postgres 和后端运维的人
**最适合 Google 技术栈团队**，前期上手快，但后期后端逻辑容易分散
综合投入产出比 ROI
**ROI 很高**，前提是你真的让一个智能体端到端接管后端自动化
**ROI 很高**，适合想要长期掌控后端架构的成熟团队
**ROI 也不错**，但更偏移动端和 Google 生态，不是 MCP 工作流首选
最适合采购的人群
**AI 应用团队**，要做 agentic SaaS、内部工具和 Vibe Coding 产品
**全栈开发团队**，更看重成熟 SQL 后端平台和稳健生态
**创业团队和移动端团队**，优先追求 Google 体系内的快速交付
zh.tldr: **买 InsForge**，如果你的目标是把 Claude Code 或 Cursor 变成后端执行者，而不只是代码生成器。**买 Supabase**，如果你更看重成熟 SQL 生态和长期稳定性。**买 Firebase**，如果你需要 Google 原生速度、实时同步和移动端优先支持。
